promptDescription: - **storyline** — tracking how multiple entities (characters, teams, products) move between groups, locations or states across a sequence of time steps, revealing when they merge, split, share a session, or enter/leave. Spec: { "type":"storyline", "title":"...", "characters":["A","B","C"], "timeLabels":["t1","t2","t3"], "table":[["G1","G1","G2"],["G2","G1","G2"],[null,"G1","G2"]] }

exampleSpec.title: A New Hope — who is where

renderScript: function(wrap,spec){ if(!wrap.style.height) wrap.style.height='460px'; function load(url,g,cb){if(window[g]){cb();return;}var s=document.createElement('script');s.src=url;s.onload=cb;document.head.appendChild(s);} load('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7/dist/d3.min.js','d3',function(){ var d3=window.d3; wrap.innerHTML=''; var W=wrap.clientWidth||760; var H=parseInt(wrap.style.height,10)||460; var chars=spec.characters||[]; var times=spec.timeLabels||[]; var table=spec.table||[]; var T=times.length; var N=chars.length; if(!T||!N){ wrap.textContent='storyline: provide characters, timeLabels and table'; return; } var palette=['#534AB7','#2E9CDB','#4BC1A8','#E8833A','#D6536D','#8E6FCE','#3FA86A','#C2A33B','#56B4C9','#B0588F','#7A8B3C','#D96C4A']; var locPal=['#EEF1FB','#EAF6FD','#E7F7F2','#FCF1E8','#FBECEF','#F2EDFA','#EAF6EF','#F8F4E4']; var locColor={}; var locN=0; for(var c=0;c<N;c++){ for(var t=0;t<T;t++){ var l0=table[c]&&table[c][t]; if(l0!=null&&l0!==''){ l0=String(l0); if(locColor[l0]===undefined){ locColor[l0]=locN++; } } } } var prevRank={}; var cols=[]; for(var t=0;t<T;t++){ var present=[]; for(var c=0;c<N;c++){ var loc=table[c]?table[c][t]:null; if(loc!=null&&loc!==''){ present.push({c:c,loc:String(loc)}); } } var gmap={}; var glist=[]; present.forEach(function(p){ if(!gmap[p.loc]){ gmap[p.loc]={loc:p.loc,members:[]}; glist.push(gmap[p.loc]); } gmap[p.loc].members.push(p.c); }); glist.forEach(function(g){ g.members.sort(function(a,b){ var ra=(a in prevRank)?prevRank[a]:1e9; var rb=(b in prevRank)?prevRank[b]:1e9; return ra-rb; }); var s=0,n=0; g.members.forEach(function(m){ if(m in prevRank){ s+=prevRank[m]; n++; } }); g.bary=n?s/n:1e9; }); glist.sort(function(a,b){ return a.bary-b.bary; }); var flat=[]; glist.forEach(function(g){ g.members.forEach(function(m){ flat.push(m); }); }); var nr={}; flat.forEach(function(m,i){ nr[m]=i; }); prevRank=nr; cols.push({groups:glist,flat:flat}); } var mL=72,mR=20,mT=spec.title?34:18,mB=34; var colW=T>1?(W-mL-mR)/(T-1):0; var maxSlots=1; cols.forEach(function(cc){ var s=cc.flat.length+(cc.groups.length-1)*0.6; if(s>maxSlots){ maxSlots=s; } }); var avail=H-mT-mB; var rowH=Math.min(avail/maxSlots,38); var gapH=rowH*0.6; var pos=[]; var bands=[]; for(var t=0;t<T;t++){ var cc=cols[t]; var total=cc.flat.length*rowH+(cc.groups.length-1)*gapH; var y=mT+(avail-total)/2; var p={}; cc.groups.forEach(function(g,gi){ if(gi>0){ y+=gapH; } var gStart=y; g.members.forEach(function(m){ p[m]=y+rowH/2; y+=rowH; }); bands.push({t:t,loc:g.loc,y1:gStart,y2:y}); }); pos.push(p); } function xAt(t){ return T>1?mL+t*colW:mL+(W-mL-mR)/2; } var NS='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'; function el(n,a){ var e=document.createElementNS(NS,n); for(var k in a){ e.setAttribute(k,a[k]); } return e; } var svg=el('svg',{width:'100%',height:H,viewBox:'0 0 '+W+' '+H}); svg.style.fontFamily='system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,sans-serif'; wrap.appendChild(svg); if(spec.title){ var ttl=el('text',{x:mL,y:20,'font-size':15,'font-weight':600,fill:'#222'}); ttl.textContent=spec.title; svg.appendChild(ttl); } var bw=Math.max(14,Math.min((T>1?colW:90)*0.5,54)); bands.forEach(function(b){ var x=xAt(b.t); svg.appendChild(el('rect',{x:x-bw/2,y:b.y1-3,width:bw,height:(b.y2-b.y1)+6,rx:7,fill:locPal[locColor[b.loc]%locPal.length]})); }); for(var t=0;t<T;t++){ var x=xAt(t); svg.appendChild(el('line',{x1:x,y1:H-mB+6,x2:x,y2:H-mB+10,stroke:'#aaa','stroke-width':1})); var lb=el('text',{x:x,y:H-mB+22,'font-size':12,fill:'#555','text-anchor':'middle'}); lb.textContent=times[t]; svg.appendChild(lb); } var line=d3.line().x(function(d){return d[0];}).y(function(d){return d[1];}).curve(d3.curveMonotoneX); for(var c=0;c<N;c++){ var color=palette[c%palette.length]; var runs=[]; var cur=[]; for(var t=0;t<T;t++){ if(pos[t][c]!==undefined){ cur.push([xAt(t),pos[t][c]]); } else if(cur.length){ runs.push(cur); cur=[]; } } if(cur.length){ runs.push(cur); } runs.forEach(function(rn){ if(rn.length===1){ svg.appendChild(el('circle',{cx:rn[0][0],cy:rn[0][1],r:3.4,fill:color})); } else { svg.appendChild(el('path',{d:line(rn),fill:'none',stroke:color,'stroke-width':2.6,'stroke-linecap':'round','stroke-linejoin':'round',opacity:0.92})); } }); var first=-1; for(var t2=0;t2<T;t2++){ if(pos[t2][c]!==undefined){ first=t2; break; } } if(first>=0){ var lx=xAt(first); var ly=pos[first][c]; var anchor=first===0?'end':'middle'; var tx=first===0?lx-8:lx; var ty=first===0?ly+4:ly-8; var nm=el('text',{x:tx,y:ty,'font-size':11,'font-weight':600,fill:color,'text-anchor':anchor}); nm.textContent=chars[c]; svg.appendChild(nm); } } }); }
